fileHelp: Upload your CSV file containing the exported bank account history here.
configHelp: Upload your configuration file here, or the default configuration will be used.
dateStartHelp: Filter results starting from this date.
dateEndHelp: Filter results up until this date.
verboseHelp: Enable detailed logging in the backend service's console.
useML: Use Machine Learning model for categorization
mlHelp: Uncheck to use regular expressions instead of the ML model.
generateReports: Generate reports from your bank account CSV history.
outlierDescription: Cells highlighted in red indicate outliers detected by IQR method.
paretoDescription: Cells highlighted in green indicate top contributors per Pareto principle.
excludedDescription: Cells highlighted in light grey are excluded from statistical analysis (calculated rows or excluded categories).
invalidCsv: Please upload a valid CSV file
invalidConfig: Please upload a valid YAML configuration file
invalidDateRange: End date must be after start date
networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
invalidStartDate: Please enter a valid start date
invalidEndDate: Please enter a valid end date
clearFormConfirmation: Are you sure you want to clear the form?
uploadFilePrompt: Please upload a CSV file first.
